dublinCore.dc:title: 119 SJ 139 PCS: Providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Environmental Protection Agency relating to “Air Plan Disapproval; Colorado; Regional Haze Plan for the Second Implementation Period”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Bennet (for himself, Mr. Whitehouse, and Mr. Hickenlooper) introduced the following joint resolution; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works
Committee discharged, by petition, pursuant to 5 U.S.C. 802(c), and placed on the calendar

form.official-title: Providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Environmental Protection Agency relating to Air Plan Disapproval; Colorado; Regional Haze Plan for the Second Implementation Period.

section.text: That Congress disapproves the rule submitted by the Environmental Protection Agency relating to Air Plan Disapproval; Colorado; Regional Haze Plan for the Second Implementation Period (91 Fed. Reg. 3048 (January 26, 2026)), and such rule shall have no force or effect.

endorsement.action-desc: Committee discharged, by petition, pursuant to 5 U.S.C. 802(c), and placed on the calendar
